auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

dashboard.selectService: Please select a service from the sidebar to get started.
dashboard.title: 🍽️ Kasa Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Your comprehensive solution for managing restaurant operations. The user authentication system is now live and ready to use. More powerful features are coming soon to help you streamline your restaurant business.
dashboard.userAuthenticationDescription: Secure login system with role-based access control for your team members.
dashboard.developmentNote: 🚀 This is just the beginning! We're actively developing more features to make your restaurant management easier and more efficient.

menuManagement.title: Menu Management
menuManagement.description: Create, edit, and organize your restaurant menu items with categories, prices, and descriptions.

orderManagement.title: Order Management
orderManagement.description: Track and manage customer orders from placement to completion with real-time updates.

tableManagement.title: Table Management
tableManagement.description: Manage table reservations, seating arrangements, and dining room capacity.

staffManagement.title: Staff Management
staffManagement.description: Manage employee schedules, roles, and performance tracking across all locations.

inventoryControl.title: Inventory Control
inventoryControl.description: Track ingredients, supplies, and automatic reorder alerts for efficient inventory management.

financialReports.title: Financial Reports
financialReports.description: Generate detailed sales reports, profit analysis, and financial insights for better decisions.

recipeManagement.title: Recipe Management
recipeManagement.description: Create and manage recipes, ingredients, and cooking instructions for consistent food quality.

customerManagement.title: Customer Management
customerManagement.description: Build customer profiles, loyalty programs, and personalized dining experiences.

multiLocationSupport.title: Multi-Location Support
multiLocationSupport.description: Manage multiple restaurant locations from a single dashboard with location-specific analytics.

settings.title: Settings
settings.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.

staff.employeeManagementDesc: Add, edit, and manage employee profiles, contact information, and personal details.
staff.schedulingDesc: Create and manage work schedules, shift assignments, and time-off requests.
staff.performanceDesc: Monitor employee performance, set goals, and track achievements.

inventory.ingredientsDesc: Track ingredient quantities, expiration dates, and supplier information.
inventory.alertsDesc: Automated notifications when inventory levels are running low.
inventory.trackingDesc: Monitor ingredient usage patterns and consumption analytics.

reports.salesDesc: Daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports with detailed breakdowns.
reports.profitDesc: Track profit margins, cost analysis, and financial performance metrics.
reports.analyticsDesc: Advanced analytics and insights for data-driven business decisions.

recipes.createDesc: Create new recipes with detailed ingredients and step-by-step instructions.
recipes.ingredientsDesc: Manage recipe ingredients, quantities, and nutritional information.
recipes.instructionsDesc: Detailed cooking steps, timing, and preparation guidelines.
